chapter_title: Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
text: A vehicle bearing license plates issued under Section 551.452 (License Plates for Package Delivery Vehicles) may cross intersections, including on or through a road or street that has a speed limit of more than 35 miles per hour.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 551. Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
##### § 551.456 — Crossing Certain Roadways

A vehicle bearing license plates issued under Section 551.452 (License Plates for Package Delivery Vehicles) may cross intersections, including on or through a road or street that has a speed limit of more than 35 miles per hour.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 119 (H.B.561), Sec. 1, eff. May 26, 2017.*

subsections.text: A vehicle bearing license plates issued under Section 551.452 (License Plates for Package Delivery Vehicles) may cross intersections, including on or through a road or street that has a speed limit of more than 35 miles per hour.
